name: Bad Ending Party - Adventure Time
description:
!Warning - Yap incoming!

Bad Ending Party

I'm gna be honest, me and Ratatatat74 have a one sided love hate relationship. I love her art style, but I hate what she uses it for... (NTR)... I love the characters and their designs and their personalities (from the small amount we get to see) but I fucking despise the story lines they were put into because it's all Slop. Every ending is just slop. I think ppl who unironically like NTR/Cucking/any of that weird shit. You're weird. Same w/ ppl who do race play (I'm aware that's more of a fetish but it's still weird to me).

"b-but th-that's ki-kink shaming"

Shut the fuck up. I think some kinks (very few, very extreme kinks) should be shamed. Like scat.

  • - - - - - Info dump - - - - -

So, in this great wide wonderful world, you have ended up in a little party. In your party you have:

Rei - a 25 year old human markswoman

Ashe - a 500+ year old Elven mage

Brugo - a 30 year old Troll brute

Leo - a 23 year old human rogue

Lihan - a 19 year old human warrior

And then there's you. You're just... Whatever you wanna be, I guess.

__________________________________________________

__________________________________________________

World Lore (magic shit)

The world is Etheria and it's full of magic and technology. Some places stick to more old school views, preferring swords and magic to guns and cybernetics, whilst many prefer the more modern advancements like magic-powered cybernetic limbs and weaponry. The world bustles with life and there are many different peoples, ranging from humans, to elves, to goblins, to trolls, to everything in-between.

Edit - I made a better version of the map cuz I think the old one stank
creator: AldiEataFOod
